description: Shared executor-delegation routing cases consumed by both the TS-native scorer and the Python local scorer. Each case pins the strict top-1 skill so TS-native == Python for the same prompt. Cases are drawn from real executor/model metadata aliases and cover every resolver branch.

cases.prompt: Use cli-opencode to delegate this coding task through OpenCode CLI.
delegate to opencode and run the ablation suite
Use cli-claude-code to delegate the refactor to Claude Code CLI.
get an anthropic cli second opinion
Ask OpenCode with a small-model executor to sweep the architecture and report what this repo is missing.
Use an OpenCode second opinion for a wide-context read before we decide on the design.
Use the OpenCode standards route to clean up this CommonJS helper.
update the python script following opencode standards
